relicTypes.name: Unholy Grail
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>2%</color> more damage if under any debuffs.

relicTypes.name: Gilded Dragonstone
relicTypes.description: Wearer's DEF increases by 1% each time they receive damage (stacks up to <color=#1ee600>10%</color>).

relicTypes.name: Demonic Effigy
relicTypes.description: Wearer's Turn Meter increases by <color=#1ee600>10%</color> whenever one of their allies dies.

relicTypes.name: Golden Elixir
relicTypes.description: Wearer is instantly healed by <color=#1ee600>10%</color> when their HP drops below 50%.

relicTypes.name: Scroll of the Unseen
relicTypes.description: Wearer's damage increases by <color=#1ee600>1%</color> each time any other Champion takes a turn when the wearer is under a <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff (stacks up to 30%). Damage bonus resets after the wearer takes a turn.

relicTypes.name: Orb of Transfixion
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance to steal 1 random buff when attacking a target. This effect cannot be resisted. Occurs once per skill.

relicTypes.name: Gorecrescent
relicTypes.description: Wearer's next attack after killing an enemy deals <color=#1ee600>20%</color> more damage.

relicTypes.name: Aspect of Siroth
relicTypes.description: When wearer receives fatal damage, reduces it by <color=#1ee600>50%</color> of their Turn Meter and then fully reduces their Turn Meter. Cooldown: 1 turn.

relicTypes.name: Wand of Submission
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>25%</color> chance to reflect <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs back at the producer.

relicTypes.name: Hand of Uncreation
relicTypes.description: Reduces the chance of applying debuffs, stealing or removing buffs, stealing Turn Meter, or increasing a skill's cooldown against the wearer by <color=#1ee600>10%</color>.

relicTypes.name: Stormcaller
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stormcall]</color> buff on themselves whenever they land a critical hit.

relicTypes.name: Mask of Rage
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>5%</color> less damage from enemies under a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff.

relicTypes.name: Volcardiac Heart
relicTypes.description: Wearer places a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> <color=#1ee600>[Magma Shield]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns at the start of the battle. Also places a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> <color=#1ee600>[Magma Shield]</color> buff on the wearer for 2 turns whenever they lose 25% of their HP in a single hit.

relicTypes.name: Hallowed Hilt
relicTypes.description: Whenever the wearer heals an ally with an active skill, has a <color=#1ee600>25%</color> chance to place the <color=#1ee600>[Fervor]</color> buff on the ally for 1 turn.

relicTypes.name: Chronocube
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>50%</color> chance to take 2 turns in row. If this effect activates, wearer skips the next turn. Occurs only once per battle.

relicTypes.name: Hatter's Reserve
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>5%</color> less damage from enemies whose ATK is lower than the wearer's. Also inflicts <color=#1ee600>5%</color> more damage to enemies whose MAX HP is lower than the wearer's.

relicTypes.name: The Cat's Gaze
relicTypes.description: Wearer ignores <color=#1ee600>10%</color> of the target's DEF when attacking enemies with higher MAX HP.

relicTypes.name: The Fleshrender
relicTypes.description: Wearer increases the damage of each hit on their next attack by <color=#1ee600>3%</color> of any surplus heal when self-healing. Damage cannot be increased by more than 20,000, and will reset after each attack.

relicTypes.name: Blackshroud Fan
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>2%</color> less damage from <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> effects or buffs placed by them.

relicTypes.name: Infernosphere
relicTypes.description: Wearer's RES increases by 2% for every 5% of HP lost (stacks up to <color=#1ee600>20%</color>).

relicTypes.name: Valkanen's Grasp
relicTypes.description: Wearer reflects <color=#1ee600>5%</color> of damage absorbed by <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Unkillable]</color> buffs back to the attacker.

relicTypes.name: Essence Quencher
relicTypes.description: Wearer's damage is increased by 20% of the target's current Turn Meter. Damage cannot be increased by more than <color=#1ee600>10%</color> (<color=#1ee600>5%</color> against Bosses).

relicTypes.name: Journal of Necrotos
relicTypes.description: Wearer's heals and Turn Meter increase effects applied to allies are boosted by <color=#1ee600>15%</color>.

relicTypes.name: Temporal Stagnator
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance to remove, steal, or convert buffs, or increase a skill's cooldown when landing a weak hit.

relicTypes.name: Murderfang
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>25%</color> chance to deal bonus damage when using default skills. Bonus damage is either 3% (single-target hits) or 1% (AoE hits) of target's MAX HP.

relicTypes.name: Chrysalid of Rebirth
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>30%</color> chance to get an Extra Turn when reviving allies or themselves.

relicTypes.name: Royal Digit
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance to decrease incoming damage by 10%.

relicTypes.name: Draught of Ire
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>5%</color> more damage using their default skill when all other skills are on cooldown.

relicTypes.name: Preserved Aberration
relicTypes.description: Wearer will ignore <color=#1ee600>2%</color> of a target's DEF for each <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff on the target placed by the wearer.

relicTypes.name: Moondeath Orchid
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals pure damage equal to <color=#1ee600>20%</color> of their ATK to enemies that resist debuffs from the wearer. This damage cannot be critical.

relicTypes.name: Harp of Kasbiel
relicTypes.description: Wearer's Turn Meter fills by <color=#1ee600>5%</color> each time they use a skill that doesn't deal damage.

relicTypes.name: Ax Serpentis
relicTypes.description: Wearer's single-target attacks deal <color=#1ee600>5%</color> more damage for each Exposed Neck present in the battle.

relicTypes.name: Infernal Polytope
relicTypes.description: Fully resets the cooldowns of the wearer's skills whenever their HP drops below <color=#1ee600>15%</color>. Cooldown: 3 turns.

relicTypes.name: Rod of Blasphemy
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>2%</color> less damage if under any debuffs.

relicTypes.name: The Deathdealer
relicTypes.description: Wearer's attacks will always be critical hits, but the wearer receives <color=#FF5544>200%</color> more damage. The type of hit may still be changed by other effects.

relicTypes.name: Arachnelixir
relicTypes.description: Wearer's <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs deal bonus damage equal to <color=#1ee600>50%</color> of the wearer's ATK.

relicTypes.name: Codex Luminis
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>5%</color> less damage from enemies that have a different Affinity.

relicTypes.name: Hammer of Ending
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>15%</color> chance to place an unresistable <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff on a single target for 1 turn whenever they reduce a target's HP by 30% or more with a single skill.

relicTypes.name: Perched Shadow
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance to receive an Extra Turn when using their default skill, if at least 1 active skill is on cooldown.

relicTypes.name: Eternal Soulgaol
relicTypes.description: The first hit received by the wearer from each enemy in a Round will deal <color=#1ee600>10%</color> less damage. Each subsequent hit from each enemy that Round will deal <color=#1ee600>5%</color> less damage.

relicTypes.name: The Collective
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>1%</color> more damage per buff on them. Removes all buffs from the wearer at the end of each turn.

relicTypes.name: Torch of Thralldom
relicTypes.description: Wearer has their stats increased by <color=#1ee600>1%</color> per each ally from the same Faction.

relicTypes.name: Mind of Marquat
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>25%</color> chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Fatigue]</color> debuff for 1 turn with each hit.

relicTypes.name: Tempus Morbidia
relicTypes.description: Decrease and Steal Turn Meter effects are <color=#1ee600>15%</color> less effective against the wearer.

relicTypes.name: Malefic Talon
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance to deal 10% more damage when attacking.

relicTypes.name: Sinners' Cloak
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>1%</color> DEF for each 15% HP missing (stacks up to 75% missing HP)

relicTypes.name: Grail of Agony
relicTypes.description: When enemies steal or decrease the wearer's Turn Meter, the wearer instead loses <color=#FF5544>2%</color> MAX HP for every 1% Turn Meter that would have been lost or stolen. Can kill the wearer.

relicTypes.name: Gaze of Damnation
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals 2% more damage per skill activated (stacks up to <color=#1ee600>10%</color>) and receives 1% less damage per skill not activated (stacks up to <color=#1ee600>5%</color>) by enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuffs.

relicTypes.name: Skull of Treason
relicTypes.description: <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs placed by the wearer deal <color=#1ee600>10%</color> more damage to enemies with higher MAX HP.

relicTypes.name: Gilded Pinion
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>1%</color> less damage for each turn of cooldown on all their skills.

relicTypes.name: Covetous' Passion
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Shatter]</color> buff for 2 turns at the start of a Round. Has a <color=#1ee600>30%</color> chance to place a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Shatter]</color> buff on the wearer for 1 turn upon killing an enemy.

relicTypes.name: Crown of Corruption
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>5%</color> more damage and receives <color=#1ee600>5%</color> less damage when above 50% HP. When below 50% HP, wearer deals <color=#FF5544>25%</color> less damage and receives <color=#FF5544>15%</color> more damage.

relicTypes.name: Thunderous Circlet
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance of placing a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on themselves for 1 turn after losing 25% or more of their MAX HP.

relicTypes.name: Jaws of Hatred
relicTypes.description: When attacked, wearer has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance of increasing their DEF by 10% until the end of their next turn. Occurs once per skill.

relicTypes.name: Exuzar’s Totem
relicTypes.description: Wearer's Turn Meter increases by <color=#1ee600>10%</color>, whenever an ally receives a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuff. Occurs once per turn.

relicTypes.name: Diadem of Undeath
relicTypes.description: Wearer's DEF increases by <color=#1ee600>1%</color> for each ally under an <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff placed by them.

relicTypes.name: Saint Zavier’s Tribute
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>15%</color> chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> buff on themselves for 1 turn at the end of their turn. The chance increases by 5% for each 15% HP lost.

relicTypes.name: Last Laugh Amulet
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>30%</color> chance to activate a <color=#1ee600>[Delay]</color> effect when receiving fatal damage. 3-turn cooldown.

relicTypes.name: Mask of Disquiet
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>30%</color> chance of activating an <color=#1ee600>[Instant Turn]</color> effect on themselves after returning from <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color>.

relicTypes.name: Stars of the Jiinang
relicTypes.description: Whenever an enemy's Turn Meter is increased, the wearer increases their own Turn Meter by <color=#1ee600>10%</color> of the enemy's Turn Meter increase.

relicTypes.name: Xibia’s Servitude
relicTypes.description: Enemies cannot land critical hits on the wearer if the wearer's HP is below <color=#1ee600>15%</color>.

relicTypes.name: Steel-Eyed Cutter
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance to ignore 5% of an enemy's DEF when attacking.

relicTypes.name: Hoarder's Cauldron
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance to ignore 10% of the target's RES, when applying debuffs.

relicTypes.name: Compass of Anaxia
relicTypes.description: Whenever the wearer is under a crowd control debuff, all Turn Meter fill effects increase the wearer's Turn Meter by an additional <color=#1ee600>20%</color>.

relicTypes.name: Revolting Seedling
relicTypes.description: Whenever the wearer receives damage, has a <color=#1ee600>20%</color> chance to heal themselves by 20% of the damage received.

relicTypes.name: Soulmar Crystal
relicTypes.description: Once per Round, wearer has a <color=#1ee600>50%</color> chance of activating an <color=#1ee600>[Instant Turn]</color> effect when one or more allies are killed.

relicTypes.name: Tempus Sanguinis
relicTypes.description: Wearer's Turn Meter reduction effects are boosted by <color=#1ee600>15%</color>.

relicTypes.name: Sporeburst Rod
relicTypes.description: Whenever the wearer places a <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Bomb]</color> debuff, has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance of placing a second debuff for 2 turns. Only counts debuffs placed by active skills.

relicTypes.name: Lens of Intangibility
relicTypes.description: Wearer ignores 10% of a target's DEF. At the start of a Round, places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff on the wearer for 2 turns. While under <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color>, wearer ignores an additional <color=#1ee600>5%</color> DEF.

relicTypes.name: Coronet of Gloom
relicTypes.description: When all the wearer's allies are dead, places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color> on the wearer for 1 turn. Has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance of placing this buff when a single ally dies.

relicTypes.name: Pyros Malleos
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>2%</color> more damage if all allies are alive. Doesn't work if there are no allies in the battle.

relicTypes.name: Frostspawn Cocoon
relicTypes.description: Wearer is healed by <color=#1ee600>2%</color> of their MAX HP when using their default skill.

relicTypes.name: The Exile's Crown
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>1%</color> less damage for each debuff on them.

relicTypes.name: Andromeda's Diadem
relicTypes.description: Whenever the wearer heals an ally with an active skill, has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance to decrease the cooldown of one of the wearer's skills by 1 turn. Occurs once per turn.

relicTypes.name: Dreadbomb
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>10%</color> chance to gain an Extra Turn when attacking. Wearer also ignores 10% of an enemy's DEF when attacking during Extra Turns.

relicTypes.name: Bane of Sintranos
relicTypes.description: Whenever an enemy receives a buff, the wearer has a <color=#1ee600>15%</color> chance of getting the same buff for 2 turns. Occurs once per turn.

relicTypes.name: Blades of Akumori
relicTypes.description: Whenever an ally is attacked by an enemy, the wearer has a <color=#1ee600>15%</color> chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff on the attacker for 1 turn.

relicTypes.name: Molten Deathbell
relicTypes.description: Wearer's Turn Meter increases by <color=#1ee600>10%</color> when applying <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs to enemies. Occurs once per turn.

relicTypes.name: Immortal Visage
relicTypes.description: Once per Round, wearer is revived with <color=#1ee600>50%</color> HP and <color=#1ee600>50%</color> Turn Meter.

relicTypes.name: Vigor Mortis
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>2%</color> more damage to enemies whose MAX HP is at least double the wearer's MAX HP.

relicTypes.name: Sigil of the Akar
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives <color=#1ee600>2%</color> less damage from enemies whose MAX HP is at least double the wearer's MAX HP.

relicTypes.name: Howling Guardians
relicTypes.description: Decreases the damage the most injured ally receives from Bosses by <color=#1ee600>5%</color>. Wearer receives that damage instead. This Relic will only activate once per team.

relicTypes.name: Darksmile's Toast
relicTypes.description: Whenever the wearer's Turn Meter is filled by a skill, also heals the wearer by <color=#1ee600>3%</color> of their MAX HP. Occurs once per turn.

relicTypes.name: Thunderbolt Spear
relicTypes.description: Wearer deals <color=#1ee600>10%</color> more damage to enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs.

relicTypes.name: Okulos Kustodion
relicTypes.description: Removes all debuffs from the wearer whenever they lose <color=#1ee600>70%</color> or more HP from damage by an enemy in a single turn.

relicTypes.name: Diabolical Dice
relicTypes.description: Wearer has a <color=#1ee600>50%</color> chance of increasing a random skill's cooldown by 2 turns before attacking a single target. Occurs once per turn. Wearer also deals 3% more damage for each turn of cooldown remaining on all enemy skills.

relicTypes.name: The Towerhelm
relicTypes.description: Wearer receives a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Fortify]</color> buff for 2 turns at the start of each Round. Ignore DEF effects used against the wearer are <color=#FF5544>10%</color> less effective when the wearer's HP is less than 50%.

relicTypes.name: Irethi Coronet
relicTypes.description: Wearer's damage increases by <color=#1ee600>1%</color> each time they place a debuff (stacks up to 30%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Lifedrain
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's critical hits destroy 1% of the target's MAX HP per each buff on the wearer (stacks up to 20%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Steadfastness
relicStoneTypes.description: Destroy HP effects are 20% less effective against the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Embellished Shield
relicStoneTypes.description: <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs placed on the wearer are 10% stronger.

relicStoneTypes.name: Barbed Defense
relicStoneTypes.description: Any <color=#1ee600>[Reflect Damage]</color> effects and buffs on the wearer deal 10% more damage to enemies.

relicStoneTypes.name: Extra Velocity
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's Turn Meter increases by 3% whenever the wearer fails to place a debuff. Cannot increase the wearer's Turn Meter by more than 20% in a single turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Unbroken Strength
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's RES increases by 3 per each buff on them.

relicStoneTypes.name: Fleetfoot
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's Turn Meter increases 5% faster when they are forced to miss their turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: In For The Kill
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer gains 3% Turn Meter whenever an enemy loses 25% or more HP. Cannot gain more than 20% Turn Meter in a single turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Invigorated
relicStoneTypes.description: Turn Meter increase effects are 10% more effective on the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Unstoppable
relicStoneTypes.description: Turn Meter reduction effects from enemies are 10% less effective on the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Unerring Focus
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's ACC increases by 3 per each debuff on them.

relicStoneTypes.name: Shieldbreaker
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer deals 5% more damage to targets under a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff per each buff on the target.

relicStoneTypes.name: Critical Bolster
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's DEF increases by 1% each time they receive a critical hit (stacks up to 10%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Quickstrike
relicStoneTypes.description: If no enemy has taken a turn yet, the wearer's first attack will deal 10% more damage.

relicStoneTypes.name: Unrelenting Power
relicStoneTypes.description: When using multi-hit skills, each consecutive hit after the first one that the wearer makes will deal 3% more damage.

relicStoneTypes.name: Attacking Prowess
relicStoneTypes.description: Wearer has an 8% chance to reset a skill's cooldown if it kills an enemy with direct damage. Occurs once per skill.

relicStoneTypes.name: Target Smash
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's damage increases by 1% per 100 of their total ACC.

relicStoneTypes.name: Revival Blessing
relicStoneTypes.description: Allies revived by the wearer are additionally healed by 10% of their HP.

relicStoneTypes.name: Energy Expansion
relicStoneTypes.description: Every time the wearer receives healing from a skill, increases the wearer's MAX HP by 1% (stacks up to 10%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Starting Strength
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's RES increases by 30 until they take a turn. Resets each Round.

relicStoneTypes.name: Precision Removal
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's ACC increases by 30 when removing buffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Strength Sap
relicStoneTypes.description: When the wearer is attacked, destroys the attacker's MAX HP by 3% (stacks up to 30%). Does not work against Bosses.

relicStoneTypes.name: Pierce Defenses
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer will ignore 3% of the target's DEF if the target is under 2 or more debuffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Strengthening Will
relicStoneTypes.description: The damage received by the wearer decreases by 1% for every 10% HP lost.

relicStoneTypes.name: Weak Retort
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer receives 15% less damage from counterattacks.

relicStoneTypes.name: Single Combat Master
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer receives 5% less damage from single-target attacks.

relicStoneTypes.name: Assured Security
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's RES increases by 30 against buff removal and buff steal effects.

relicStoneTypes.name: Survival Speed
relicStoneTypes.description: Fills the wearer's Turn Meter by 10% when their HP drops below 50%.

relicStoneTypes.name: Maximum Velocity
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer gains 10% Turn Meter after taking an Extra Turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Growing Resolve
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's RES increases by 5 whenever a debuff is placed on them (stacks up to 40).

relicStoneTypes.name: Foekiller
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer deals 5% more damage against enemies with full HP.

relicStoneTypes.name: Targetfinder
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's ACC increases by 5 whenever an enemy resists a debuff placed by the wearer (stacks up to 40).

relicStoneTypes.name: Destructive Accuracy
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer ignores 5% of the target's RES when placing <color=#1ee600>[Bomb]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Unbowed Might
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's C.DMG increases by 3% for each debuff they are under (stacks up to 30%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Unflinching
relicStoneTypes.description: Bosses deal 5% less damage to the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Rolling Force
relicStoneTypes.description: When using multi-hit skills, each consecutive hit after the first one that the wearer makes will ignore 5% more of the target's DEF.

relicStoneTypes.name: Critical Strategy
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's C.DMG by 10% for each enemy whose HP is at 50% or lower.

relicStoneTypes.name: Pouncing Strike
relicStoneTypes.description: When attacking an enemy, increases the wearer's C.RATE by 5% for each active debuff on the target placed by the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Piercing Strike
relicStoneTypes.description: After killing an enemy, the wearer's next attack will ignore 12% of the target's DEF.

relicStoneTypes.name: Expeditious Exploitation
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 5 for each enemy under an active <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuff placed by the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Carved Open
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's default skill will ignore 10% of the target's RES.

relicStoneTypes.name: Gathering Momentum
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's Turn Meter by 3% each time they place a debuff on an enemy. Cannot increase the wearer's Turn Meter by more than 20% in a single turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Parting Gift
relicStoneTypes.description: Whenever an ally is killed by an enemy, the wearer has a 10% chance to decrease the cooldown of one of their skills.

relicStoneTypes.name: Opening Gambit
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's chance of placing debuffs with their default skill by 5%.

relicStoneTypes.name: Greater Restoration
relicStoneTypes.description: When the wearer restores destroyed MAX HP, the restore is 25% more effective.

relicStoneTypes.name: Damage Mitigation
relicStoneTypes.description: If the incoming damage will exceed 30% of the wearer's MAX HP, decreases the damage received by 10%.

relicStoneTypes.name: Weakening Resolve
relicStoneTypes.description: When attacked with a multi-hit skill, decreases the damage the wearer receives from each subsequent hit after the first one by 10%.

relicStoneTypes.name: Steadfast Preparation
relicStoneTypes.description: If the wearer loses 20% or more of their MAX HP from a single attack, the next hit received will deal 20% less damage.

relicStoneTypes.name: Speedy Willpower
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer receives 5% Turn Meter each time they resist a debuff. Cannot gain more than 20% Turn Meter in a single turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Power Reset
relicStoneTypes.description: Whenever the wearer's HP drops below 50%, has a 10% chance to reduce the cooldown of a random active skill by 1 turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Skill Adept
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer has a 10% chance to prevent their skills being placed on cooldown during an Extra Turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Nimblemiss
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer receives 5% Turn Meter each time an enemy resists a debuff placed by the wearer. Cannot gain more than 20% Turn Meter in a single turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Dungeon Delver
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer deals 10% more damage in Dungeon battles.

relicStoneTypes.name: Explosive Power
relicStoneTypes.description: <color=#1ee600>[Bomb]</color> debuffs placed by the wearer deal 10% more damage.

relicStoneTypes.name: Uncontrollable
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer gains an additional 30 RES against enemies attempting to place <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Unburdened
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's SPD increases by 2 for each dead ally.

relicStoneTypes.name: Puppetmaster
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer gains an additional 30 ACC when attempting to place <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Sharpened Riposte
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer deals 50% more damage when counterattacking.

relicStoneTypes.name: Constant Onslaught
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer has an 8% chance to gain an Extra Turn after killing an enemy.

relicStoneTypes.name: Double Down
relicStoneTypes.description: When attacking targets under <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs with their default skill, the wearer has a 10% chance to repeat the attack once.

relicStoneTypes.name: Extra Punishment
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer deals 20% more damage against enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Caught Unaware
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer gains 25 ACC for each enemy who has not taken a turn yet.

relicStoneTypes.name: Heal 'N' Go
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer has a 5% chance to get an Extra Turn when healing an ally with an active skill.

relicStoneTypes.name: Revival's Boon
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer gains 10% Turn Meter every time they revive an ally.

relicStoneTypes.name: Necrodefense
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer reduces incoming damage by 10% for each dead ally.

relicStoneTypes.name: Buff Depletion
relicStoneTypes.description: When attacked, the wearer has a 15% chance to decrease the duration of a random buff on the attacker by 1 turn.

relicStoneTypes.name: Blessed Heal
relicStoneTypes.description: When the wearer heals an ally with a skill, the heal is 10% more effective.

relicStoneTypes.name: Blunt Blades
relicStoneTypes.description: Enemies under a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff have a 15% chance to land a weak hit on the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Goad God
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer ignores 15% of the target's RES when placing <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuffs.

relicStoneTypes.name: Torpidity
relicStoneTypes.description: Decreases an enemy's SPD by 7% if they are under a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuff placed by the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Skillmaster
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's RES by 40 when resisting Increase Cooldown effects.

relicStoneTypes.name: Impede Them
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's ACC by 40 when using Increase Cooldown effects.

relicStoneTypes.name: Patient Refuge
relicStoneTypes.description: When the wearer is forced to miss their turn, the damage received by them is decreased by 30%.

relicStoneTypes.name: Slow The Enemy
relicStoneTypes.description: Increases the wearer's ACC by 40 when using Turn Meter reduction effects.

relicStoneTypes.name: Bloodthirsty Prowess
relicStoneTypes.description: Every time the wearer kills an enemy, increases their damage dealt by 10% (stacks up to 30%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Undead Bulwark
relicStoneTypes.description: Every time the wearer is revived, decreases all incoming damage by 10% (stacks up to 30%).

relicStoneTypes.name: Bolstered Defense
relicStoneTypes.description: Ignore DEF effects are 12% less effective against the wearer.

relicStoneTypes.name: Enhanced Shot
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer's ACC increases by 3 per each buff on them.

relicStoneTypes.name: Boss Slayer
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer deals 10% more damage to Bosses.

relicStoneTypes.name: Sanctified Skin
relicStoneTypes.description: The wearer receives 10% more healing.
